title: afzelia javanica
intro: Afzelia javanica, also known as Javan ironwood or Borneo ironwood, is a large tree species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Afzelia javanica are attributed to its ability to treat various conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Afzelia javanica is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its bark, leaves, and roots are used in traditional remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
